ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot preparing for a hike, starting with both arms relaxed at its sides, then lifting one arm in a motion akin to hoisting a backpack, and finally settling into a walking stance.  The lack of elbows in the robot's arms will require careful positioning of the shoulders to convey the actions. Frame 1 will show both arms hanging neutrally, Frame 2 will show the left arm lifting a backpack, Frame 3 will show the robot taking a step with one foot, and Frame 4 will show the robot in a walking stance. Frame 5 will show the robot settling back into a ready stance. Let's begin!

frames.beat: arms hang loosely, ready for the trail
left arm lifts, hoisting a heavy backpack
the robot shifts weight, preparing to step
settling into a steady hiking posture
both arms hang, ready for the journey
